---
title: "PONG2 Training: Building Custom KIR Prediction Models"
author: "Norman Lab"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_width: 7
    fig_height: 5
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{PONG2 Training Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE   # Examples are shown but not executed during vignette build
)
